3193540.name: Diamond Board
3193540.description:
Hire a hitman, learn to go backwards, buy property to hide, and learn to attack by landing on the enemy first. Acquire currency around the board to buy power ups and bribe the enemy. Careful, if you bribe the enemy too often, another enemy will show up on the board. Win by killing all the enemies or lose by running out of currency when an enemy lands on the player.

When the property is bought or the hitman is hired, you can hide in either property. When both the hitman is hired and the property is bought, you can smuggle between the two properties.
